title: X6827-H812OPQ-S-OP-230613V1226-230802V1249_20230802163837
description:
Caution! This update may crash rooted devices.
Please plug in charger to OTA upgrade when power is lower than 50%.
Update Version:X6827-H812OPQ-S-OP-230802V1249
Optimized issues:
1.Updated Google Security Patch to July 5, 2023.
2.For a better user experience, we may remove some pre-installed apps that are less used in your region.
-Hi Translate
-Palmpay
-XShare Mini
If you really need to use them, please download the latest versions in Google Play.
Reminding:
1.Optimized system stability and performance while fixing other issues.
2.Visit XClub forum(Geekbar)for more information.
